The '''Zenox Star Cluster''' was a star cluster located within the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]] region of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] and was part of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]], Chancellor [[Qua]] represented the cluster in the [[Thirteenth Imperial Diplomatic Conclave]] hosted by [[Thalassa Tarkin|Lady Tarkin]] in [[Port Tarkin]], [[Phelarion/Legends|Phelarion]].

{{Sec-stub}}
